characters.name: The Keeper
characters.wardrobe: heather-grey crew-neck t-shirt, worn khaki work trousers, round dark-teal acetate glasses, short silver-blond side-swept hair, light grey stubble
characters.voice: Graham (en) — dry unhurried baritone, cast for age/register match
characters.notes: user's own likeness, photo supplied by user; wardrobe never changes

shots.action: Dead orange plain, three dust plumes rising.
shots.start_frame_prompt: gritty 35mm anamorphic film still, Mad Max style desert wasteland, burnt-orange dust haze, teal shadow grade, blown-out white sun, film grain, 24mm wide shot locked low to cracked orange clay ground, flat dead plain to the horizon, three tall black dust plumes rising on the horizon line, low rocky ridge far right, white-hot sky, heat shimmer, empty wasteland, zero people
shots.video_prompt: heat shimmer ripples over the cracked clay, three black dust plumes crawl left to right along the horizon, camera locked, foreground rocks and horizon line stay still

review_notes.why: matches SPEC; viewed via Read
dust plumes crawl, heat shimmer, camera locked - per SPEC

shots.action: Chrome grille explodes through the dust.
shots.start_frame_prompt: gritty 35mm anamorphic film still, Mad Max style desert wasteland, burnt-orange dust haze, teal shadow grade, blown-out white sun, film grain, 85mm low angle close-up of one rusted chrome truck grille with riveted steel teeth, one cracked headlight, barbed-wire wrap, massive dust cloud filling the entire background, sun glinting on chrome, machine only, zero people
shots.video_prompt: the rusted chrome truck grille bursts forward through the dust toward camera, dust whips past the lens, slight crash push-in, violent speed

review_notes.why: matches SPEC; viewed via Read
violent grille advance through dust, crash energy excellent

shots.action: The wall of welded car doors between rock outcrops.
shots.start_frame_prompt: gritty 35mm anamorphic film still, Mad Max style desert wasteland, burnt-orange dust haze, teal shadow grade, blown-out white sun, film grain, 24mm wide shot, towering wall of welded rust-streaked car doors spanning the frame between two dark rock outcrops, steel plate seams, one sun-bleached sky-blue car door among the rust, orange dust sky behind, hard shadows in the door seams, zero people
shots.video_prompt: camera tilts slowly up the wall of welded car doors, thin dust drifts across frame, the wall and the rocks stay rigid

review_notes.why: matches SPEC; viewed via Read
wall rigid, dust drift; tilt gentler than SPEC but reads well at 4s

shots.action: Hand-painted sign: a single green leaf.
shots.start_frame_prompt: gritty 35mm anamorphic film still, Mad Max style desert wasteland, burnt-orange dust haze, teal shadow grade, blown-out white sun, film grain, 85mm macro detail, dead-center framing, hand-painted white sign with a single green leaf bolted with two rusted bolts onto welded car-door steel, paint slightly peeling, raking sunlight from upper right, flat steel background filling the frame, zero people
shots.video_prompt: very slow push-in on the hand-painted white sign with a single green leaf, a thin ribbon of dust slides across the steel, the sign and the bolts stay perfectly still

review_notes.why: matches SPEC; viewed via Read
clean slow push on leaf sign, sign/bolts static

shots.action: SMASH CUT: the garden. Green. Birdsong.
shots.start_frame_prompt: sunlit 35mm film still, warm Kodak color, lush green garden bounce light, soft summer morning sun from upper left, gentle film grain, 24mm wide shot down a brick path, lush enclosed garden, raised timber vegetable beds with tomato vines, two fruit trees, deep green foliage on all sides, the inside face of a wall of welded rust-streaked car doors far in the background, zero people
shots.video_prompt: slow dolly forward along the brick path, leaves stir in a light wind, the beds the path and the wall stay fixed

review_notes.why: matches SPEC; viewed via Read
dolly down brick path confirmed, leaves stir, wall integrated bg

shots.camera: 50mm waist-up, slow orbit shoulder to profile
shots.start_frame_prompt: sunlit 35mm film still, warm Kodak color, lush green garden bounce light, soft summer morning sun from upper left, gentle film grain, 50mm waist-up shot from behind the shoulder of <<<28087740-12dd-485c-89ff-9b87ab8b68c4>>>, a mid-50s man with short silver-blond side-swept hair, round dark-teal acetate glasses, light grey stubble, heather-grey crew-neck t-shirt, worn khaki work trousers, tilting a galvanized watering can over tomato vines on timber stakes, rim light on his silver hair, green foliage behind, one man only, no other people
shots.video_prompt: <<<28087740-12dd-485c-89ff-9b87ab8b68c4>>> tilts the galvanized watering can, water arcs onto the tomato vines, camera orbits slowly from behind his shoulder to his profile, only his arms move, background stays still

review_notes.why: matches SPEC; viewed via Read
water arc onto vines, arm-only motion, slow orbit; identity anchors hold

shots.action: One lettuce leaf for the rabbit.
shots.start_frame_prompt: sunlit 35mm film still, warm Kodak color, lush green garden bounce light, soft summer morning sun from upper left, gentle film grain, 85mm close shot at hutch height, <<<28087740-12dd-485c-89ff-9b87ab8b68c4>>>, a mid-50s man with short silver-blond side-swept hair, round dark-teal acetate glasses, light grey stubble, heather-grey crew-neck t-shirt, worn khaki work trousers, crouched at a timber rabbit hutch with wire-mesh front, holding one lettuce leaf through the mesh to one grey-brown rabbit, dappled leaf shadow, brick path under his boots, green foliage behind, one man and one rabbit only
shots.video_prompt: <<<28087740-12dd-485c-89ff-9b87ab8b68c4>>> offers the lettuce leaf through the wire mesh, the one grey-brown rabbit takes one small bite, camera static, nothing else moves

review_notes.why: matches SPEC; viewed via Read

shots.action: War party stalled on the ridge. They never attack.
shots.start_frame_prompt: gritty 35mm anamorphic film still, Mad Max style desert wasteland, burnt-orange dust haze, teal shadow grade, blown-out white sun, film grain, 85mm long-lens compression shot, four distant black human silhouettes standing on a ridge crest against the orange dust sky, two distant silhouetted vehicles beside them, idle dust drifting, the wall of welded rust-streaked car doors small in the valley below, figures backlit pure silhouette, far away, no facial detail
shots.video_prompt: dust drifts across the ridge, one distant silhouette slowly lowers a raised arm, the silhouetted vehicles shudder at idle, the ridge line and the valley stay fixed, camera locked

review_notes.why: matches SPEC; viewed via Read
silhouettes hold position, dust drift, idle menace

shots.action: Tea in the deck chair. The sky is still ending. Not his problem.
shots.start_frame_prompt: sunlit 35mm film still, warm Kodak color, lush green garden bounce light, soft summer morning sun from upper left, gentle film grain, 35mm knee-up frontal shot of <<<28087740-12dd-485c-89ff-9b87ab8b68c4>>>, a mid-50s man with short silver-blond side-swept hair, round dark-teal acetate glasses, light grey stubble, heather-grey crew-neck t-shirt, worn khaki work trousers, sitting in a weathered wooden deck chair holding a chipped white enamel mug, garden lawn edge, the inside face of the wall of welded rust-streaked car doors behind him, boiling orange dust sky above the wall line, soft morning sun on him, one man only, no other people
shots.video_prompt: <<<28087740-12dd-485c-89ff-9b87ab8b68c4>>> raises the chipped white enamel mug and takes one slow sip, steam curls from the mug, the orange dust sky churns slowly above the wall, very slow push-in, the deck chair and the wall stay still

review_notes.why: tighter than SPEC (no garden fg, wall directly behind) but dramatically stronger; approved as variation
raise-and-sip clean, orange sky churning above wall; identity holds

shots.start_frame_prompt: sunlit 35mm film still, warm Kodak color, lush green garden bounce light, soft summer morning sun from upper left, gentle film grain, 50mm portrait close-up of <<<28087740-12dd-485c-89ff-9b87ab8b68c4>>>, a mid-50s man with short silver-blond side-swept hair, round dark-teal acetate glasses, light grey stubble, heather-grey crew-neck t-shirt, worn khaki work trousers, scratched brass welding goggles pushed up on his forehead, thin black drip-line tubing coil in his lap, soft green bokeh background, catch-light in the round dark-teal acetate glasses, faint half-smile, one man only
shots.video_prompt: <<<28087740-12dd-485c-89ff-9b87ab8b68c4>>> smiles faintly then pulls the scratched brass welding goggles down over the round dark-teal acetate glasses with one hand, camera static, shoulders and background stay still

review_notes.why: matches SPEC; viewed via Read
smile -> goggles pulled down over glasses, ends seated; the button beat exactly

shots.action: Dusk. The wall tiny at the horizon. Title in post.
shots.start_frame_prompt: gritty 35mm anamorphic film still, Mad Max style desert wasteland, burnt-orange dust haze, teal shadow grade, blown-out white sun, film grain, 24mm wide shot at dusk, vast empty wasteland, the wall of welded rust-streaked car doors tiny at the horizon, low blown-out sun on the horizon behind the wall, orange dust sky at dusk, the wall the only structure, zero people
shots.video_prompt: dust drifts slowly, the light dims very slightly, barely perceptible slow zoom toward the wall, horizon stays level

review_notes.why: matches SPEC; viewed via Read
dusk plate, gentle drift, ready for drawtext title

music.prompt: aggressive cinematic war drums, taiko and metal percussion hits, accelerating tempo, Mad Max wasteland chase score, abrupt hard stop at the end
warm pastoral acoustic theme, fingerpicked nylon guitar and soft strings, serene and gently wry, slow build to a tender swell, peaceful morning

sfx.prompt: swarm of distant V8 engines roaring and circling, desert wind, dust hiss, menacing approach
peaceful garden ambience, morning birdsong, light leaves rustling, gentle water sprinkling on plants
single sharp percussive clack, brass goggles snapping into place, dry close foley
single engine roar passing by and fading away into distance, doppler effect, resolving into quiet wind
